arts.sum: Spain wrapped up top spot with a 2-1 win over Denmark last time out, and will look to see out the UEFA Nations League with a win. Switzerland's 1-1 draw with Serbia compounded Switzerland to relegati...

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal eyeing return for Celtic clash
arts.sum: It will not be until next week, when he is tested in training, when a real prognosis can be made about his chances of returning for the next game - against Celta at Balaídos on Saturday. The Pole, who has problems with his lower back, is expected to return to training midweek, while Eric is already in the final stages of his right adductor injury, as is Fort, who has discomfort to the base of his spine.
